verified.notes: Income eligibility varies slightly across sources (2022 guidelines show $27,180 single/$36,620 couple; 2026 sources show $31,300 single/$42,300 couple). Phone number 800-642-5119 is the official statewide HelpLine cited by multiple Area Agencies on Aging. Program is active and administered through Vermont's four Area Agencies on Aging as part of AmeriCorps Seniors. No asset limits found in search results.
